package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Kamakhya Spiritual Tour Package — Divine Pilgrimage: Guwahati • Nilachal Hills • Hajo

highlights.text: Serial code AS-007 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-AS-KAM-007
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Pilgrimage & Spiritual
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Nilachal Hills • Hajo
Ideal for: Devotees, Families, Spiritual Seekers
Best season: October to April (Ambubachi period for special darshan)
Starting price: On Request (Premium Tailored Rates)
Vehicle: Private Premium Luxury AC SUV (Toyota Innova Crysta) | Meal Plan: MAPAI — elaborate breakfasts and gourmet dinners
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Nilachal Hills Inner Sanctum ➔ Hajo ➔ Brahmaputra Confluence ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Skip crowded queues with meticulously mapped morning entry schedules.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Hand-vetted transport partners for safe, reliable city driving.
Exclusive Recommendations: Verified index of spiritual souvenir shops and authentic handloom centers.
Shopping: Fancy Bazar & Pan Bazar bell-metal artifacts, Muga and Pat silk sarees from state emporiums.
Important Notes: Conservative dress at Kamakhya; vehicle restricted past 10 PM; book festivals 30-45 days ahead.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Kamakhya Spiritual Tour Package — Divine Pilgrimage: Guwahati • Nilachal Hills • Hajo
itinerary.tagline: Kamakhya Spiritual Pilgrimage • Guwahati • Hajo • 03 Nights / 04 Days
itinerary.overview:
Embark on a sacred odyssey into the spiritual epicenter of the Northeast with VIP connectivity and luxurious boutique comfort.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nKamakhya Spiritual Tour by TRAGUIN bridges historical antiquity with premium stays. Route: Guwahati ➔ Nilachal Hills ➔ Hajo ➔ Brahmaputra Confluence ➔ Departure.

THE ESSENCE OF ASSAM SIGHTSEEING\nKamakhya Temple Shakti worship, Umananda Peacock Island, Hajo interfaith confluence, and luxury private river decks at sunset.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-007 | Kamakhya Spiritual Pilgrimage Guwahati | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days Kamakhya spiritual package (AS-007 / TG-AS-KAM-007): VIP darshan, Hajo pilgrimage, Umananda cruise, 4-tier Guwahati hotels.

highlights.text: Guwahati arrival with Vashistha Ashram and Brahmaputra Riverfront Day 01
Priority Kamakhya Temple darshan and Sukreswar Temple Arati Day 02
Hajo pilgrimage and private Brahmaputra cruise to Umananda Day 03

days.title: ARRIVAL IN GUWAHATI | WELCOME TO THE SACRED VALLEY
days.description: Sacred journey begins at Guwahati airport with traditional Assamese gamosas. Late afternoon visit serene Vashistha Ashram and sunset stroll along the Brahmaputra Riverfront.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vashistha Ashram, Brahmaputra Riverfront.
Evening Experience: Relaxing evening briefing over premium local tea.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.

days.title: DIVINE DARSHAN | INNER SANCTUM OF MAA KAMAKHYA TEMPLE
days.description: Priority entry sequence for Maa Kamakhya Temple inner sanctum with Dasa Mahavidyas shrines. Evening Sukreswar Temple traditional Arati on the river banks.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kamakhya Temple (Main Darshan), Sukreswar Temple Arati.
Optional Activities: Personal consultation with temple pandits for family rituals.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.

days.title: HAJO PILGRIMAGE & PRIVATE SUNSET RIVER CRUISE
days.description: Visit historic Hajo and Hayagriva Madhava Temple. Private premium charter cruise to Umananda Temple on Peacock Island at golden hour.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Hajo Temples, Umananda Island Temple, Private River Cruise.
Photography Points: Mid-river shots of the Guwahati skyline at golden hour.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Farewell Gala Dinner.

days.title: SACRED SOUVENIRS & DEPARTURE
days.description: Relaxed breakfast and spiritual keepsakes shopping before graceful airport transfer concluding your TRAGUIN spiritual getaway.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Local shopping markets route.

hotels.name: Hotel Grand Majesty / Kiranshree Portico

hotels.name: Vivanta Guwahati (Taj Group)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: Vivanta Guwahati Taj Group Premium Suite (Guwahati, 3 Nights) | Bespoke Dining Privileges

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 3 Nights accommodation at the finest handpicked hotels based on your preferred tier.
Luxury Transportation: All transfers and local sightseeing via a private air-conditioned Toyota Innova Crysta.
Meals: Daily multi-cuisine buffet breakfasts and premium dinners at your hotel.
Assistance: Personalized airport arrival handling and dedicated TRAGUIN support.
Taxes: All current fuel costs, toll prices, parking fees, and government service taxes.
Welcome Amenities: Assamese traditional welcome scarves, fresh fruit platters, and premium bottled water.
Complimentary Experiences: A scenic private boat cruise to the Umananda river island.
Flights: Main airline or train transport ticketing to and from Guwahati.
Entry Tickets: Camera fees, special quick darshan ticket costs, and internal temple donation offerings.
Personal Expenses: Laundry service, telephone usage bills, and individual hotel room minibar consumptions.
Activities: Any additional unlisted local boat hires or individual tour options.
Insurance: Travel medical or cancellation insurance policies.
